response.justification: The candidate has extensive full-stack and polyglot experience but lacks focused, recent C++ development in industrial automation or embedded systems; their C++ exposure is dated (NI LabWindows™/CVI) and not tied to core requirements like multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or IoT protocols. Their strength lies in web, Node.js, and DLang, with minimal evidence of scalable on-prem/cloud C++ architecture, secure development lifecycle, or industrial cybersecurity practices.
strengths: Strong full-stack and polyglot development experience across multiple languages and domains.
Demonstrated leadership in open-source projects and technical mentoring through workshops.
Proven ability to deliver complex systems under tight constraints (e.g., real-time apps, high-throughput services).
concerns: Minimal recent C++ experience; no evidence of STL, concurrent systems, or message brokers in current role.
No demonstrated exposure to IEC 62443, SDL, or industrial cybersecurity standards.
Lacks direct IoT, Modbus, OPC UA, or industrial automation domain experience.
